title: Foundry Gallery
tagline: ~23 tiny, self-contained linguistics toys — etymology timelines to phonetics visualisers — spun up by the build system

functionality.name: Etymology Timelines
functionality.blurb: Trace how words evolve over time with self-contained etymology timeline toys.

functionality.name: Phonetics Visualisers
functionality.blurb: Small visualisers for exploring the sounds of language.

functionality.name: Language Games
functionality.blurb: Quick, playful language games to poke at how words work.

functionality.name: Logic-of-Ideas Demos
functionality.blurb: Compact demos exploring the logic of ideas.

functionality.name: Auto-Generated Set
functionality.blurb: The whole grab-bag of roughly 23 toys is auto-generated by the build system.

detail_body: A collection of ~23 small, self-contained linguistics toys — etymology timelines, phonetics visualisers, language games, and logic-of-ideas demos.
Every toy is auto-generated by the build system: a grab-bag of quick, curious experiments to explore.
